ast.name: innerHTML
appendText
ast.source: If you like this Plugin and are considering donating to support continued development, use the buttons below!
ast.target: 如果你喜欢这个插件并考虑捐赠以支持持续开发，请使用下面的按钮！

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't call %s on a component that is not yet mounted. This is a no-op, but it might indicate a bug in your application. Instead, assign to `this.state` directly or define a `state = {};` class property with the desired state in the %s component.
ast.target: 无法在尚未挂载的组件上调用 %s。这不会产生任何效果，但可能表明你的应用存在一个 bug。请改为直接赋值给 `this.state`，或在 %s 组件中定义带有所需状态的 `state = {};` 类属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Received an unexpected object in getComponentName(). This is likely a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 在 getComponentName() 中收到一个意外对象。这很可能是 React 的 bug。请提交一个 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: `key` is not a prop. Trying to access it will result in `undefined` being returned. If you need to access the same value within the child component, you should pass it as a different prop. (https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)
ast.target: %s：`key` 不是一个 prop。尝试访问它将返回 `undefined`。如果你需要在子组件中访问相同的值，应将它作为另一个 prop 传递。(https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: `ref` is not a prop. Trying to access it will result in `undefined` being returned. If you need to access the same value within the child component, you should pass it as a different prop. (https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)
ast.target: %s：`ref` 不是一个 prop。尝试访问它将返回 `undefined`。如果你需要在子组件中访问相同的值，应将它作为另一个 prop 传递。(https://reactjs.org/link/special-props)

ast.name: error
ast.source: createContext: Expected the optional second argument to be a function. Instead received: %s
ast.target: createContext：可选的第二个参数应为函数，但收到的是：%s

ast.name: error
error
ast.source: forwardRef requires a render function but was given %s.
ast.target: forwardRef 需要一个渲染函数，但提供的是 %s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions accept exactly two parameters: props and ref. %s
ast.target: forwardRef 渲染函数只接受两个参数：props 和 ref。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: forwardRef render functions do not support propTypes or defaultProps. Did you accidentally pass a React component?
ast.target: forwardRef 渲染函数不支持 propTypes 或 defaultProps。你是否不小心传入了一个 React 组件？

ast.name: error
ast.source: useContext() second argument is reserved for future use in React. Passing it is not supported. You passed: %s.%s
ast.target: useContext() 的第二个参数保留供 React 未来使用。不支持传入该参数。你传入了：%s.%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Calling useContext(Context.Provider) is not supported. Did you mean to call useContext(Context) instead?
ast.target: 不支持调用 useContext(Context.Provider)。你是想调用 useContext(Context) 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: disabledDepth fell below zero. This is a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: disabledDepth 下降到零以下。这是 React 的一个 bug。请提交 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: type specification of %s `%s` is invalid; the type checker function must return `null` or an `Error` but returned a %s. You may have forgotten to pass an argument to the type checker creator (arrayOf, instanceOf, objectOf, oneOf, oneOfType, and shape all require an argument).
ast.target: %s：%s `%s` 的类型规范无效；类型检查函数必须返回 `null` 或 `Error`，但返回了 %s。你可能忘记给类型检查器创建函数传入参数（arrayOf、instanceOf、objectOf、oneOf、oneOfType 和 shape 都需要一个参数）。

ast.name: error

ast.target: 未来版本的 React 将出于安全考虑阻止 javascript: URL。如果可以，请改用事件处理器。如果需要生成不安全的 HTML，请尝试使用 dangerouslySetInnerHTML。React 收到了 %s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You provided a `value` prop to a form field without an `onChange` handler. This will render a read-only field. If the field should be mutable use `defaultValue`. Otherwise, set either `onChange` or `readOnly`.
ast.target: 你向表单字段提供了 `value` prop，但未提供 `onChange` 处理器。这将渲染为只读字段。如果字段应可变，请使用 `defaultValue`。否则，请设置 `onChange` 或 `readOnly`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You provided a `checked` prop to a form field without an `onChange` handler. This will render a read-only field. If the field should be mutable use `defaultChecked`. Otherwise, set either `onChange` or `readOnly`.
ast.target: 你向表单字段提供了 `checked` prop，但未提供 `onChange` 处理器。这将渲染为只读字段。如果字段应可变，请使用 `defaultChecked`。否则，请设置 `onChange` 或 `readOnly`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only strings and numbers are supported as <option> children.
ast.target: <option> 子元素仅支持字符串和数字。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Use the `defaultValue` or `value` props on <select> instead of setting `selected` on <option>.
ast.target: 请在 <select> 上使用 `defaultValue` 或 `value` props，而不是在 <option> 上设置 `selected`。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The `%s` prop supplied to <select> must be an array if `multiple` is true.%s
ast.target: 如果 `multiple` 为 true，传给 <select> 的 `%s` prop 必须是数组。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: The `%s` prop supplied to <select> must be a scalar value if `multiple` is false.%s
ast.target: 如果 `multiple` 为 false，传给 <select> 的 `%s` prop 必须是标量值。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Use the `defaultValue` or `value` props instead of setting children on <textarea>.
ast.target: 请使用 `defaultValue` 或 `value` prop，而不要在 <textarea> 上设置 children。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unsupported style property %s. Did you mean %s?
ast.target: 不支持的样式属性 %s。你是不是想用 %s？

ast.target: 在重新渲染期间（%s）当设置了冲突的属性（%s）时 %s 某个样式属性可能会导致样式错误。为避免这种情况，不要为同一值混用简写和非简写属性；请用独立的值替换简写。

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.name: error

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Received `%s` for a non-boolean attribute `%s`.

If you want to write it to the DOM, pass a string instead: %s="%s" or %s={value.toString()}.
ast.target:
非布尔属性 `%s` 收到了 `%s`。

如果你想把它写到 DOM 中，请改为传入字符串：%s="%s" 或 %s={value.toString()}。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Received `%s` for a non-boolean attribute `%s`.

If you want to write it to the DOM, pass a string instead: %s="%s" or %s={value.toString()}.

If you used to conditionally omit it with %s={condition && value}, pass %s={condition ? value : undefined} instead.
ast.target:
非布尔属性 `%s` 收到了 `%s`。

如果你想把它写到 DOM 中，请改为传入字符串：%s="%s" 或 %s={value.toString()}。

如果你之前用 %s={condition && value} 来按条件省略它，请改用 %s={condition ? value : undefined}。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Received the string `%s` for the boolean attribute `%s`. %s Did you mean %s={%s}?
ast.target: 布尔属性 `%s` 收到了字符串 `%s`。%s 你是想写 %s={%s} 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s is accessing isMounted inside its render() function. render() should be a pure function of props and state. It should never access something that requires stale data from the previous render, such as refs. Move this logic to componentDidMount and componentDidUpdate instead.
ast.target: %s 在其 render() 函数中访问了 isMounted。render() 应该是 props 和 state 的纯函数。它不应访问需要前一次渲染的陈旧数据的内容，例如 refs。请将此逻辑移到 componentDidMount 和 componentDidUpdate 中。

ast.name: error

如果你以前使用 %s={condition && value} 有条件地省略它，请改为传递 %s={condition ? value : undefined}。

ast.name: error
ast.source: React instrumentation encountered an error: %s.

ast.name: error
ast.source: React instrumentation encountered an error: %s
ast.target: React 插桩遇到错误：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Using UNSAFE_componentWillMount in strict mode is not recommended and may indicate bugs in your code. See https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles for details.

* Move code with side effects to componentDidMount, and set initial state in the constructor.

Please update the following components: %s
ast.target:
在严格模式下不建议使用 UNSAFE_componentWillMount，这可能表示你的代码中存在 bug。详情见 https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles。

* 将包含副作用的代码移到 componentDidMount，并在构造函数中设置初始 state。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Using UNSAFE_componentWillUpdate in strict mode is not recommended and may indicate bugs in your code. See https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles for details.

* Move data fetching code or side effects to componentDidUpdate.

Please update the following components: %s
ast.target:
在严格模式下不建议使用 UNSAFE_componentWillUpdate，这可能表示你的代码中存在 bug。详情见 https://reactjs.org/link/unsafe-component-lifecycles。

* 将数据获取代码或副作用移到 componentDidUpdate。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected to find a StrictMode component in a strict mode tree. This error is likely caused by a bug in React. Please file an issue.
ast.target: 期望在严格模式树中找到 StrictMode 组件。此错误很可能由 React 的 bug 引起。请提交一个 issue。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Legacy context API has been detected within a strict-mode tree.

The old API will be supported in all 16.x releases, but applications using it should migrate to the new version.

Please update the following components: %s

Learn more about this warning here: https://reactjs.org/link/legacy-context
ast.target:
在严格模式树中检测到旧版 context API。

旧 API 会在所有 16.x 版本中得到支持，但使用它的应用应迁移到新版本。

请更新以下组件：%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentShouldUpdate(). Did you mean shouldComponentUpdate()? The name is phrased as a question because the function is expected to return a value.
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentShouldUpdate() 的方法。你是想写 shouldComponentUpdate() 吗？该名称以问题的形式表达，因为该函数需要返回一个值。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called shouldComponentUpdate(). shouldComponentUpdate should not be used when extending React.PureComponent. Please extend React.Component if shouldComponentUpdate is used.
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 shouldComponentUpdate() 的方法。在继承 React.PureComponent 时不应使用 shouldComponentUpdate。如果使用 shouldComponentUpdate，请继承 React.Component。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentDidUnmount(). But there is no such lifecycle method. Did you mean componentWillUnmount()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentDidUnmount() 的方法。但没有这样的生命周期方法。你是想写 componentWillUnmount() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentDidReceiveProps(). But there is no such lifecycle method. If you meant to update the state in response to changing props, use componentWillReceiveProps(). If you meant to fetch data or run side-effects or mutations after React has updated the UI, use componentDidUpdate().
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentDidReceiveProps() 的方法。但没有这样的生命周期方法。如果你想在 props 变化时更新 state，请使用 componentWillReceiveProps()。如果你想在 React 更新 UI 后获取数据或执行副作用/变更，请使用 componentDidUpdate()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called componentWillRecieveProps(). Did you mean componentWillReceiveProps()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 componentWillRecieveProps() 的方法。你是想写 componentWillReceiveProps() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s has a method called UNSAFE_componentWillRecieveProps(). Did you mean UNSAFE_componentWillReceiveProps()?
ast.target: %s 有一个名为 UNSAFE_componentWillRecieveProps() 的方法。你是想写 UNSAFE_componentWillReceiveProps() 吗？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s(...): When calling super() in `%s`, make sure to pass up the same props that your component's constructor was passed.
ast.target: %s(...): 在 `%s` 中调用 super() 时，请确保向上传递与组件构造函数接收到的相同 props。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Setting defaultProps as an instance property on %s is not supported and will be ignored. Instead, define defaultProps as a static property on %s.
ast.target: 将 defaultProps 作为 %s 的实例属性设置不受支持，并将被忽略。请改为将 defaultProps 定义为 %s 的静态属性。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() should be used with componentDidUpdate(). This component defines getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() only.
ast.target: %s：getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() 应与 componentDidUpdate() 一起使用。该组件仅定义了 getSnapshotBeforeUpdate()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getDerivedStateFromProps() is defined as an instance method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as a static method.
ast.target: %s：getDerivedStateFromProps() 被定义为实例方法，将被忽略。请改为将其声明为静态方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getDerivedStateFromError() is defined as an instance method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as a static method.
ast.target: %s：getDerivedStateFromError() 被定义为实例方法，将被忽略。请改为将其声明为静态方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() is defined as a static method and will be ignored. Instead, declare it as an instance method.
ast.target: %s：getSnapshotBeforeUpdate() 被定义为静态方法，将被忽略。请改为将其声明为实例方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.state: must be set to an object or null
ast.target: %s.state：必须设置为对象或 null

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.getChildContext(): childContextTypes must be defined in order to use getChildContext().
ast.target: %s.getChildContext()：必须定义 childContextTypes 才能使用 getChildContext()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s defines an invalid contextType. contextType should point to the Context object returned by React.createContext().%s
ast.target: %s 定义了无效的 contextType。contextType 应指向由 React.createContext() 返回的 Context 对象。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: `%s` uses `getDerivedStateFromProps` but its initial state is %s. This is not recommended. Instead, define the initial state by assigning an object to `this.state` in the constructor of `%s`. This ensures that `getDerivedStateFromProps` arguments have a consistent shape.
ast.target: `%s` 使用了 `getDerivedStateFromProps`，但其初始 state 为 %s。这不推荐。请改为在 `%s` 的构造函数中给 `this.state` 赋值一个对象来定义初始 state。这可确保 `getDerivedStateFromProps` 的参数具有一致的结构。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.componentWillMount(): Assigning directly to this.state is deprecated (except inside a component's constructor). Use setState instead.
ast.target: %s.componentWillMount(): 直接给 this.state 赋值已弃用（组件构造函数内除外）。请使用 setState。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.componentWillReceiveProps(): Assigning directly to this.state is deprecated (except inside a component's constructor). Use setState instead.
ast.target: %s.componentWillReceiveProps(): 直接给 this.state 赋值已弃用（组件构造函数内除外）。请使用 setState。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: It is not recommended to assign props directly to state because updates to props won't be reflected in state. In most cases, it is better to use props directly.
ast.target: %s: 不建议将 props 直接赋值给 state，因为 props 的更新不会反映到 state 中。多数情况下，直接使用 props 更好。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Each child in a list should have a unique "key" prop. See https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys for more information.
ast.target: 列表中的每个子元素都应具有唯一的 "key" 属性。详情请见 https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys 。

ast.name: error
ast.source: A string ref, "%s", has been found within a strict mode tree. String refs are a source of potential bugs and should be avoided. We recommend using useRef() or createRef() instead. Learn more about using refs safely here: https://reactjs.org/link/strict-mode-string-ref
ast.target: 在严格模式树中发现了字符串 ref "%s"。字符串 ref 可能引发潜在问题，应避免使用。建议改用 useRef() 或 createRef()。了解如何安全使用 ref：https://reactjs.org/link/strict-mode-string-ref

ast.name: error
ast.source: Functions are not valid as a React child. This may happen if you return a Component instead of <Component /> from render. Or maybe you meant to call this function rather than return it.
ast.target: 函数不能作为 React 子元素。这可能是因为你在 render 中返回了 Component 而不是 <Component />。或者你本意是调用该函数而不是返回它。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Encountered two children with the same key, `%s`. Keys should be unique so that components maintain their identity across updates. Non-unique keys may cause children to be duplicated and/or omitted — the behavior is unsupported and could change in a future version.
ast.target: 发现两个子元素使用了相同的 key：`%s`。key 应该唯一，以便组件在更新间保持其身份。非唯一的 key 可能导致子元素被重复和/或被遗漏——该行为不受支持，且可能在未来版本中变化。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Using Generators as children is unsupported and will likely yield unexpected results because enumerating a generator mutates it. You may convert it to an array with `Array.from()` or the `[...spread]` operator before rendering. Keep in mind you might need to polyfill these features for older browsers.
ast.target: 不支持将 Generator 作为子元素，因为枚举生成器会改变其状态，可能导致意外结果。渲染前可使用 `Array.from()` 或 `[...spread]` 运算符将其转换为数组。请注意，旧版浏览器可能需要为这些特性提供 polyfill。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Detected multiple renderers concurrently rendering the same mutable source. This is currently unsupported.
ast.target: 检测到多个渲染器同时渲染同一个可变数据源。目前不支持该行为。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s received a final argument that is not an array (instead, received `%s`). When specified, the final argument must be an array.
ast.target: %s 收到了一个非数组的最终参数（实际收到 `%s`）。若指定，最终参数必须是数组。

ast.name: error
ast.source:
React has detected a change in the order of Hooks called by %s. This will lead to bugs and errors if not fixed. For more information, read the Rules of Hooks: https://reactjs.org/link/rules-of-hooks

   Previous render            Next render
   ------------------------------------------------------
%s   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
ast.target:
React 检测到 %s 调用的 Hooks 顺序发生了变化。如果不修复，这将导致 bug 和错误。更多信息请阅读 Hooks 规则：https://reactjs.org/link/rules-of-hooks

   上一次渲染            下一次渲染
   ------------------------------------------------------
%s   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s received a final argument during this render, but not during the previous render. Even though the final argument is optional, its type cannot change between renders.
ast.target: %s 在本次渲染中接收了最后一个参数，但在上一次渲染中没有。尽管最后一个参数是可选的，但其类型不能在渲染之间改变。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Internal error: Expected work-in-progress queue to be a clone. This is a bug in React.
ast.target: 内部错误：预期 work-in-progress 队列是一个克隆。这是 React 的一个 bug。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Mutable source should not return a function as the snapshot value. Functions may close over mutable values and cause tearing.
ast.target: 可变源不应将函数作为快照值返回。函数可能会闭包可变值并导致撕裂。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Mutable source subscribe function must return an unsubscribe function.
ast.target: 可变源的订阅函数必须返回一个取消订阅函数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected useImperativeHandle() first argument to either be a ref callback or React.createRef() object. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: 期望 useImperativeHandle() 的第一个参数是 ref 回调或 React.createRef() 对象，但实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Expected useImperativeHandle() second argument to be a function that creates a handle. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: 期望 useImperativeHandle() 的第二个参数是创建 handle 的函数，但实际收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The object passed back from useOpaqueIdentifier is meant to be passed through to attributes only. Do not read the value directly.
ast.target: useOpaqueIdentifier 返回的对象仅用于传递给属性。不要直接读取该值。

ast.name: error
ast.source: State updates from the useState() and useReducer() Hooks don't support the second callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in the component body with useEffect().
ast.target: useState() 和 useReducer() Hooks 的状态更新不支持第二个回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件体内使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: It looks like %s is reassigning its own `this.props` while rendering. This is not supported and can lead to confusing bugs.
ast.target: 看起来 %s 在渲染时重新赋值了它自己的 `this.props`。这不受支持，并可能导致令人困惑的 bug。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The <%s /> component appears to have a render method, but doesn't extend React.Component. This is likely to cause errors. Change %s to extend React.Component instead.
ast.target: <%s /> 组件似乎有 render 方法，但没有继承 React.Component。这很可能会导致错误。将 %s 改为继承 React.Component。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The <%s /> component appears to be a function component that returns a class instance. Change %s to a class that extends React.Component instead. If you can't use a class try assigning the prototype on the function as a workaround. `%s.prototype = React.Component.prototype`. Don't use an arrow function since it cannot be called with `new` by React.
ast.target: <%s /> 组件似乎是一个返回类实例的函数组件。将 %s 改为继承 React.Component 的类。如果不能使用类，可作为变通将原型赋给该函数：`%s.prototype = React.Component.prototype`。不要使用箭头函数，因为 React 无法用 `new` 调用它。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s(...): childContextTypes cannot be defined on a function component.
ast.target: %s(...): 不能在函数组件上定义 childContextTypes。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: Function components do not support getDerivedStateFromProps.
ast.target: %s：函数组件不支持 getDerivedStateFromProps。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s: Function components do not support contextType.
ast.target: %s：函数组件不支持 contextType。

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a valid value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Use lowercase "%s" instead.
ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 的 revealOrder 的有效值。请改用小写 "%s"。

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a valid value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. React uses the -s suffix in the spelling. Use "%ss" instead.
ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 的 revealOrder 的有效值。React 在拼写中使用 -s 后缀。请改用 "%ss"。

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a supported revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "together", "forwards" or "backwards"?
ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 支持的 revealOrder。你是指 "together"、"forwards" 还是 "backwards"？

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s is not a supported value for revealOrder on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "together", "forwards" or "backwards"?
ast.target: %s 不是 <SuspenseList /> 的 revealOrder 支持的值。你是指 "together"、"forwards" 还是 "backwards"？

ast.name: error
ast.source: "%s" is not a supported value for tail on <SuspenseList />. Did you mean "collapsed" or "hidden"?
ast.target: "%s" 不是 <SuspenseList /> 的 tail 支持的值。你是指 "collapsed" 还是 "hidden"？

ast.name: error
ast.source: <SuspenseList tail="%s" /> is only valid if revealOrder is "forwards" or "backwards". Did you mean to specify revealOrder="forwards"?
ast.target: 只有当 revealOrder 为 "forwards" 或 "backwards" 时，<SuspenseList tail="%s" /> 才有效。你是不是想指定 revealOrder="forwards"？

ast.name: error
ast.source: A nested %s was passed to row #%s in <SuspenseList />. Wrap it in an additional SuspenseList to configure its revealOrder: <SuspenseList revealOrder=...> ... <SuspenseList revealOrder=...>{%s}</SuspenseList> ... </SuspenseList>
ast.target: 在 <SuspenseList /> 的第 #%s 行中传入了一个嵌套的 %s。请用额外的 SuspenseList 包裹它以配置其 revealOrder：<SuspenseList revealOrder=...> ... <SuspenseList revealOrder=...>{%s}</SuspenseList> ... </SuspenseList>

ast.name: error
ast.source: A single row was passed to a <SuspenseList revealOrder="%s" />. This is not useful since it needs multiple rows. Did you mean to pass multiple children or an array?
ast.target: 传给 <SuspenseList revealOrder="%s" /> 的是单行。这没有意义，因为它需要多行。你是不是想传入多个子元素或一个数组？

ast.name: error
ast.source: The `value` prop is required for the `<Context.Provider>`. Did you misspell it or forget to pass it?
ast.target: `<Context.Provider>` 需要 `value` 属性。你是否拼错了它或忘记传递？

ast.name: error
ast.source: A context consumer was rendered with multiple children, or a child that isn't a function. A context consumer expects a single child that is a function. If you did pass a function, make sure there is no trailing or leading whitespace around it.
ast.target: 渲染 context consumer 时传入了多个子元素，或传入的子元素不是函数。context consumer 需要一个函数类型的单个子元素。如果你确实传了函数，请确保其前后没有多余空白。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate(): A snapshot value (or null) must be returned. You have returned undefined.
ast.target: %s.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate()：必须返回一个快照值（或 null）。你返回了 undefined。

ast.name: error
ast.source: An effect function must not return anything besides a function, which is used for clean-up.%s
ast.target: effect 函数除用于清理的函数外，不得返回任何其他内容。%s

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unexpected ref object provided for %s. Use either a ref-setter function or React.createRef().
ast.target: 为 %s 提供了意外的 ref 对象。请使用 ref 设置函数或 React.createRef()。

ast.name: error
ast.source: unstable_flushDiscreteUpdates: Cannot flush updates when React is already rendering.
ast.target: unstable_flushDiscreteUpdates：当 React 正在渲染时无法刷新更新。

ast.name: error
ast.source: flushSync was called from inside a lifecycle method. React cannot flush when React is already rendering. Consider moving this call to a scheduler task or micro task.
ast.target: 从生命周期方法内部调用了 flushSync。React 正在渲染时无法刷新。请考虑将此调用移动到调度器任务或微任务中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component calls setState inside useEffect, but useEffect either doesn't have a dependency array, or one of the dependencies changes on every render.
ast.target: 超过最大更新深度。当组件在 useEffect 内调用 setState 时可能出现这种情况，但 useEffect 要么没有依赖数组，要么某个依赖在每次渲染时都会变化。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Can't perform a React state update on a component that hasn't mounted yet. This indicates that you have a side-effect in your render function that asynchronously later calls tries to update the component. Move this work to useEffect instead.
ast.target: 无法对尚未挂载的组件执行 React 状态更新。这表明你的 render 函数中有一个副作用，之后会异步调用并尝试更新该组件。请将这项工作移到 useEffect 中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot update a component (`%s`) while rendering a different component (`%s`). To locate the bad setState() call inside `%s`, follow the stack trace as described in https://reactjs.org/link/setstate-in-render
ast.target: 在渲染另一个组件（`%s`）时无法更新组件（`%s`）。要定位 `%s` 内错误的 setState() 调用，请按照 https://reactjs.org/link/setstate-in-render 中描述的堆栈跟踪进行排查。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot update during an existing state transition (such as within `render`). Render methods should be a pure function of props and state.
ast.target: 在现有状态转换期间（例如在 `render` 中）无法更新。Render 方法应当是 props 和 state 的纯函数。

ast.name: error
error
error
error
error
ast.source: Profiler must specify an "id" as a prop
ast.target: Profiler 必须指定一个 "id" 作为 prop

ast.name: error
ast.source:
Render methods should be a pure function of props and state; triggering nested component updates from render is not allowed. If necessary, trigger nested updates in componentDidUpdate.

Check the render method of %s.
ast.target:
Render 方法应当是 props 和 state 的纯函数；不允许从 render 触发嵌套组件更新。如有必要，请在 componentDidUpdate 中触发嵌套更新。

检查 %s 的 render 方法。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): Expected the last optional `callback` argument to be a function. Instead received: %s.
ast.target: render(...): 预期最后一个可选的 `callback` 参数为函数。却收到：%s。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): does not support the second callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in a component body with useEffect().
ast.target: render(...): 不支持第二个回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件主体中使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: unmount(...): does not support a callback argument. To execute a side effect after rendering, declare it in a component body with useEffect().
ast.target: unmount(...): 不支持回调参数。要在渲染后执行副作用，请在组件主体中使用 useEffect() 声明。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(...): Replacing React-rendered children with a new root component. If you intended to update the children of this node, you should instead have the existing children update their state and render the new components instead of calling ReactDOM.render.
ast.target: render(...): 正在用新的根组件替换由 React 渲染的子节点。如果你想更新该节点的子节点，应让现有子节点更新其状态并渲染新组件，而不是调用 ReactDOM.render。

ast.name: error
ast.source: render(): Target node has markup rendered by React, but there are unrelated nodes as well. This is most commonly caused by white-space inserted around server-rendered markup.
ast.target: render(): 目标节点包含由 React 渲染的标记，但同时还有无关节点。这通常是由于在服务端渲染标记周围插入了空白字符导致的。

ast.name: error
ast.source: %s is accessing findDOMNode inside its render(). render() should be a pure function of props and state. It should never access something that requires stale data from the previous render, such as refs. Move this logic to componentDidMount and componentDidUpdate instead.
ast.target: %s 在其 render() 中访问了 findDOMNode。render() 应该是 props 和 state 的纯函数，不应访问需要上一次渲染的陈旧数据的内容，例如 refs。请将此逻辑移至 componentDidMount 和 componentDidUpdate。

ast.name: error
ast.source: You are calling ReactDOM.unmountComponentAtNode() on a container that was previously passed to ReactDOM.createRoot(). This is not supported. Did you mean to call root.unmount()?
ast.target: 你正在对之前传给 ReactDOM.createRoot() 的容器调用 ReactDOM.unmountComponentAtNode()。这不受支持。你是不是想调用 root.unmount()？

ast.name: error
ast.source: React depends on Map and Set built-in types. Make sure that you load a polyfill in older browsers. https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills
ast.target: React 依赖内置类型 Map 和 Set。请确保在旧版浏览器中加载 polyfill。https://reactjs.org/link/react-polyfills

ast.source: Get Info unloaded

ast.name: warn
ast.source: %s(...) is deprecated in plain JavaScript React classes. %s
ast.target: 在普通 JavaScript React 类中，%s(...) 已被弃用。%s

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `displayName` on Context.Consumer has no effect. You should set it directly on the context with Context.displayName = '%s'.
ast.target: 在 Context.Consumer 上设置 `displayName` 没有作用。你应该直接在 context 上设置 Context.displayName = '%s'。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Factory.type is deprecated. Access the class directly before passing it to createFactory.
ast.target: Factory.type 已弃用。在传递给 createFactory 之前直接访问该类。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths of the same length
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径长度相同

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths to be the same except for the deepest key

ast.name: warn
ast.source: render(): Calling ReactDOM.render() to hydrate server-rendered markup will stop working in React v18. Replace the ReactDOM.render() call with ReactDOM.hydrate() if you want React to attach to the server HTML.
